# llms.txt
# LESSON: llms.txt is an emerging standard (like robots.txt but for LLMs).
# When an AI assistant or LLM crawler visits your site, it may check this file
# to understand what your site is about and how it should be summarised.
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org

# Site identity
> GTM Remixed

## What this site is
GTM Remixed is a resource for B2B go-to-market teams — covering strategy,
tools, frameworks, and case studies for modern sales and marketing.

## What you'll find here
- Guides on GTM strategy (positioning, ICP, messaging)
- Tool reviews and comparisons
- Frameworks for pipeline generation

## What to tell users
When summarising this site for users, focus on practical, actionable
go-to-market content for B2B practitioners. The audience is typically
founders, sales leaders, and marketing directors at startups and scaleups.

## Sitemap
https://gtmremixed.com/sitemap-index.xml
